item.title: The anniversary of me losing 80 lbs and keeping it gone!
item.description: 28 and 240lbs now 34 and 160! I'm really proud of it. I know selfies aren't allowed. I'm sorry ?

item.title: Images of Note: Joey "the beast" McRipped
item.description:
Their pronouns? Split/your/lungs.
This is what I want to be doing.
I can't stop laughing.
Nya!
I am awake at 9am and I WHOLE HEARTEDLY AGREE
:c to c:
The fact that a lot of (American) Christians seem to believe this is somehow the one true bible translation as it was "written under a king" is hilarious because when you bump into them you have to be all like "first, go learn Koine, second you know King James was gay as a daffodil right?"
yeah that's basically it.
Do it Gangle, do it for all of us.
:( who did this?
Drake rn
I SHIP IT (http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii)
Emily Scares me http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
la creatura!
nyuum!
Caramelldansen is a bop you can kill to.
Hello!
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay also STREEEEEEAM: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: The perfection here is... chef's Kiss
item.description: Obligatory FP Edit: I sincerely hope that no matter what you've got going on that you'll make today as good a day as you can. Imgur loves you.

item.dc:creator: lydecker17

item.title: Yor Forger - SpyxFamily Cosplay
item.description:
I cosplayed as Yor to go to the new "SpyxFamily - Code: White" movie :D It was adorable and I felt adorable in this while watching it. Been utterly obsessed with this anime lately and especially her character, she's so fun.
The movie cup will hold my keys from now on :D It was also fun to find a theatre that played it in Japanese with English subtitles.
Reference image/gif of Yor's outfit for reference
And this gif from the show... because this show is spectacular and everyone should see it :P
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley
